card.name: Righteous Reforging
card.text: Search your library for an equipment card and put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Put an indestructible counter on that equipment. You may attach it to a creature you control.

card.name: Strati, Ikli Starspeaker
Plumb the Depths
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Voracious Elasmodracid
card.text: As long as defending player controls an island, this creature can't be blocked by fewer than three creatures. {U}, Discard this card: You get a Moonstone counter.

card.name: Skallayt, Ambitious Warlord
card.text: Menace, vigilance, trample As long as an opponent controls more lands or has more Moonstone counters than you, other creatures you control have menace and get +1/+0. Otherwise, other creatures you control have vigilance and get +0/+1.

card.name: Moonstones MST
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures an opponent controls deal combat damage to you while you have more Moonstone counters than they do, that opponent gets a Moonstone counter. Remove two Moonstone counters from yourself: Scry 2. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Courageous Assembly
card.text: For each militant you control, create a token that's a copy of it. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.)

card.name: Leave No Witnesses
card.text: Destroy all non-outlaw creatures. (Assassins, Mercenaries, Pirates, Rogues, and Warlocks are outlaws.)

card.name: Iceclaw Swordfrey
card.text: When this creature enters, you may remove a Moonstone counter from yourself. If you do, it gains haste until end of turn. First strike

card.name: Circumzenith Guardian
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you attack, creatures you control with flying get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Icon of Dead Futures
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to an opponent, that player loses 1 life for each creature that dealt combat damage to them, then you draw a card. {2}{U}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Deathspark Speaker
card.text: Ward—Exile two cards from your graveyard {B}{R}, {T}, Discard a card: This creature deals 1 damage to any target and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Fireseed
card.text: {2}{G}: Mill 3 cards. You may return a land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. {1}{R}, Discard a card: This enchantment deals X damage to any target, where X is the number of land cards put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Laughing Path Master
card.text: Whenever another creature enters, you gain 1 life. At the beginning of your end step, if you've gained 3 or more life this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Mayarai, Bonesnouts Leader
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay 2 life. If you do, create a 1/1 black Rat Rogue creature token with menace. Whenever you attack, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, draw a card and gain 1 life.

card.name: Flux-node Birthing
card.text: Wisdom 4 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile four cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Whenever you pay a Wisdom cost, create a 3/2 blue and red Drake Elemental creature token with flying.

card.name: Taza, Exiled Princess
card.text: When Taza enters, create a 1/1 black Rat Rogue creature token with menace. Other Rat creatures you control get +1/+1. At the beginning of combat, target Rat you control gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Aerieguard Captain
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a militant card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.) Militant creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Cenote King
card.text: When this creature enters, you get a Moonstone counter. {1}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery, and only if you have 3 or more Moonstone counters.

card.name: Migronn, Steadfast Thyl
card.text: Trample, reach, ward {1} The first spell you cast each turn has Wisdom 4. (As an additional cost to cast that spell, you may exile 4 cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.)

card.name: Follower of the Updraft Path
card.text: Flying {W}: This creature gains lifelink until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Kitsan Knight-Errant
card.text: When this creature dies, choose one — • You gain 2 life. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target Militant you control. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.)

card.name: Petalseeker Mistress
card.text: Whenever a token creature you control attacks, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Truth Diviner
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Confident Huntress
card.text: When this creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on target Cat you control.

card.name: Youngling Protector
card.text: Sacrifice this creature: Creature tokens you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Stubborn Hornblower
card.text: When this creature dies, create two 1/1 white Goat Peasant creature tokens.

card.name: Cheerful Messenger
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you gain 1 life, then draw a card.

card.name: Thraupian Harrier
card.text: Flying {W}, {T}: Tap target creature. This ability costs {1} more to activate if it targets a militant. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.)

card.name: Marks of Guilt
card.text: Wisdom 4 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile four cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: Blue Sky Elite
card.text: First strike

card.name: City Gate Patrol
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Dog Soldier creature token.

card.name: Generous Vendor
card.text: When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Blessing of Kaniya
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it's blocking, it gets +3/+3 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Dub
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has first strike, and is a Knight in addition to its other types.

card.name: Mobilize the Village
card.text: Create three 1/1 white Rat Citizen creature tokens.

card.name: Plucking A Thorn
card.text: This spell deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain life equal to the excess damage dealt this way.

card.name: Serene Crystallization
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Ring of Assurance
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. Whenever this artifact becomes tapped, you gain 1 life. {T}: Add {W}.

card.name: Xolotl Raider
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, that player discards a card.

card.name: Ortugan Elder
card.text: Defender {2}{U}: Until end of turn, this creature loses defender, gets +2/+0, and can't be blocked. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you've paid a Wisdom cost this turn.

card.name: Uncompromising Artist
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card. Then discard a card unless there are two or more noncreature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Kodiloan Sentry
card.text: Flash This creature gets +2/+0 as long as you have two or more Moonstone counters.

card.name: Beachside Patrol
card.text: The first time each turn an opponent casts a spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Keensight Sorcerer
card.text: When this creature enters, you get a Moonstone counter. Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast as long as you've gotten one or more Moonstone counters this turn.

card.name: Hullcutter Duo
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 blue Octopus Rogue creature token. Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control with lesser power can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Selaki Stormrider
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast until your next turn.

card.name: Siltshore Sentinel
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • Return target creature you don't control to its owner's hand. • Scry 2, then you get a Moonstone counter.

card.name: Armed Delegation
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, that opponent chooses one — • You draw a card. • They tap a creature they control and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Elder Cirein
card.text: When this creature enters, you draw a card. This creature can't be blocked as long as you've cast two or more instant and/or sorcery spells this turn.

card.name: Brash Saorbeak
card.text: Flying When this creature leaves the battlefield, if it attacked or blocked this turn, scry 2.

card.name: Amulet of the Future
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. When this artifact enters, scry 3. {T}: Add {U}.

card.name: Moonhalo Restraint
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block. Remove three Moonstone counters from yourself: Return this Aura to your hand. Enchanted creature's owner shuffles it into their library.

card.name: Unsummon
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Raise Shields
card.text: Wisdom 3 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile three cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Target creature gains hexproof and gets +0/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Unweaving Ritual
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target permanent spell. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Anticipate Their Next Moves
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}, where X is 2 plus the total number of cards with Wisdom in your graveyard and the number of permanents you control with Wisdom.

card.name: Battle-Weary Swordtail
card.text: When this creature dies, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control. • Create a 1/1 white Rat Citizen creature token.

card.name: Despair Path Master
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card, then choose one — • You lose 1 life. • You discard a card.

card.name: Adept of the Blood Codex
card.text: Ward—pay 2 life {2}, Sacrifice a creature: You draw a card, then each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Iron Empire Kenin
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Spiked Diggers
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. Then if there are two or more creature cards in your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Moonwarped Beast
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or remove a Moonstone counter from yourself. Menace

card.name: Midnight Messenger
card.text: When this creature enters, each player discards a card. Pay 1 life: This creature gains flying until end of turn. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Banished Clairvoyant
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. When you do, target creature you control gains menace until end of turn. At the beginning of your end step, if any player discarded a card this turn, scry 2.

card.name: Escaped Lab Rat
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card, then you may discard a card.

card.name: Snatcher Drakeling
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target artifact, creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Dalus Desert Askor
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control with power 2 or less gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Sign Your Life Away
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Each player loses 2 life. You draw two cards. If a token creature was sacrificed to cast this spell, you draw three cards instead.

card.name: Infernal Resourcefulness
card.text: Destroy target creature with mana value 2 or less. If that creature doesn't share a creature type with a creature you control, you may return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Deceptive Wagering
card.text: Target player discards two cards. Then if you discarded one or more cards this turn, that player sacrifices a creature. Surveil 2.

card.name: Blow to the Pharynx
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Reluctant Companions
card.text: Create a 1/1 black Rat Rogue creature token with menace and a 1/1 white Rat Citizen creature token. Then you lose 1 life unless you control three or more Rats.

card.name: Carnikinesis
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. • Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Unnerving Onyx
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. When this artifact enters, you may put target creature card in your graveyard on top of your library. {T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Play Dead
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: Worldly Sellsword
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, if it attacked this turn or if you discarded a card this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Prepared Fortress Guard
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {1}. If you do, it deals 1 damage to defending player.

card.name: Lafahdian Minister of the Arcane
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. This creature gets +1/+0 as long as there are five or more cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Mountain Miner
card.text: This creature has menace as long as there are two or more land cards in your graveyard. Whenever this creature attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Adventuring Mages of Squa
card.text: When this creature enters, if it's not a token, create a token that's a copy of it. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, instant and sorcery spells you cast this turn cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Aardite Brute
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, if it isn't attacking or blocking alone, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Eccentric Scavenger
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, if you cast it, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand, then return a card at random from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Army of West Khyth
Greater Imaca
card.text: Haste This creature has trample as long as you've cast an instant or sorcery this turn.

card.name: Gem Igniter
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice one or more lands, or discard one or more land cards, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. {3}, Sacrifice a land: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn as a sorcery.

card.name: Sprite Bolt
card.text: Wisdom 5 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile five cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) This spell deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Sound the Dragonhorn
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn, then choose one — • Target creature gains haste until end of turn. • Target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Smash Open
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact. • Target creature gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Entrancing Ruby
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. When this artifact enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {R}.

card.name: Storm's Strike
card.text: Wisdom 2 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Fireside Tales
card.text: Wisdom 2 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Discard a card, then draw two cards.

card.name: Flames of Passion
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've discarded one or more cards this turn. This spell deals 5 damage to target permanent. Draw a card.

card.name: Driven to Destruction
card.text: Kicker—sacrifice a land This spell deals 4 damage to any target if that target is a permanent or if this spell was kicked.

card.name: Flower Stalker
card.text: This creature has vigilance as long as you've gotten a Moonstone counter or discarded a card this turn. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Sika Matriarch
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.

card.name: Unphased Journeyers
card.text: Wisdom 5 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile five cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Trample

card.name: Fangscale Geologist
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards, then return a land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Night-Stroll Guardian
card.text: When this creature enters, reveal the top card of your library. If it's a Rat card, you may put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it back on top of your library or into your graveyard.

card.name: Glacier Lookout
card.text: Kicker {2} Reach When this creature enters, if it was kicked, create a creature token that's a copy of it. When this creature enters, you get a Moonstone counter.

card.name: Wildheart Guardian
card.text: Ward {1} This creature gets +2/+2 as long as there are two or more land cards in your graveyard.

card.name: School of Seaquids
card.text: This creature enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. {1}{U}: For each kind of counter on target permanent or player, give that permanent or player another counter of that kind. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sociable Inn Owner
card.text: Trample This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if you've gained life this turn. When this creature enters, you gain 2 life and scry 1.

card.name: Unconventional Summoner
card.text: When this enters, create a 1/1 white Dragon creature token with flying.

card.name: Scallywag Tracker
card.text: Deathtouch When this enters, if a land card entered or left your graveyard this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Thunder God's Boon
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gets +3/+3 and gains reach. Scry 1.

card.name: Haul In the Nets
card.text: Choose one — • You get three Moonstone counters, then may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Grapple with the Past
card.text: Mill three cards, then you may return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Moonguided Shot
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with flying. • Untap target creature you control. Until end of turn, that creature gets +1/+2 and gains reach.

card.name: Ruined Relics
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. If an artifact is destroyed this way, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control. Otherwise, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Limb Enhancement
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, you get a Moonstone counter. Enchanted creature gets +2/+3.

card.name: Tangled in Crops
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Shard of Growth
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. When this artifact enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {T}: Add {G}.

card.name: Rooftop Pouncer
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it as long as you control another militant. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.) First strike {W}: Untap this creature. It gains reach until your next turn. Activate only once each turn and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hagzaga Squadron
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever another creature with flying you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Duchess of the Trials
card.text: When this creature enters, for each player, exile up to one other target nonland permanent that player controls. Each of those cards' owners may pay {1} as a sorcery to put them into their hand.

card.name: Stoic Medic
Spire Guru
card.text: Flying Pay 3 life: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap this creature. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Contemplative Relaxation
card.text: Gain 5 life. Create a 1/1 white Cat Peasant creature, then put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Draw a card.

card.name: Sunblaze Aerie Delegate
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever another creature dies for the first time each turn while this creature is tapped, untap this creature.

card.name: Lafahd Royal Expedition
card.text: Ward {2} Whenever this creature attacks, if defending player has seven or more cards in their graveyard, this creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Rewoven Fates
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or a nontoken, noncreature permanent. Return target creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Bracer of Light
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and has ward {2}. (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Storm of Defiance
card.text: This spell costs {W} less to cast as long as you control three or more creatures or a militant creature. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.) Exile target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Ridgeline Monitor
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, choose one — • Scry 1, then draw a card. • Return target permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Isthmus Guardian
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Moonstone counter you have. Vigilance When this creature enters, draw two cards.

card.name: Veteran Burglar
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you search their library for a nonland, noncreature card and exile it, then that player shuffles. You may play the exiled card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast that spell.

card.name: Stormwind Master
Slicefin Thief
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, until end of turn, if you would get one or more counters, you get that many plus one of each kind of those counters instead. {B}: This creature gains menace until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Thundersnap Toxibrach
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it. When this creature blocks, return all creatures it blocked to their owner's hand at end of combat.

card.name: Hydrokinetic Mastery
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying, vigilance, and ward {2}.

card.name: Empowered Unraveling
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1} for each Moonstone counter you have.

card.name: Runic Restraints
card.text: Wisdom 4 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile four cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Tap target nonland permanent and put two stun counters on it. Draw a card.

card.name: Summon the Soulchasers
card.text: Wisdom 2 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Create two 1/1 blue Bird Spirit creature tokens with flying.

card.name: Relevant Texts
card.text: Draw two cards. You get a Moonstone counter.

card.name: Darkside Wish-granter
card.text: When this enters, you get a Moonstone counter, then draw a card. {1}{B}, {T}, Discard a card: Search target opponent's library for a card and reveal it. That player loses life equal to that card's mana value, puts it into their hand, then shuffles. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Shadowspiller
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, that opponent sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Piraji Ambusher
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, each player loses 1 life. {U}: This creature can't be blocked until end of turn. This ability costs {X} more to activate, where X is this creature's power minus one. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Evercursed
card.text: Deathtouch At the beginning of your end step, if this card is in your graveyard, you may pay {1}. If you do, return it to your hand.

card.name: Hermit of Erud Swamp
card.text: Your maximum hand size is six. At the beginning of your end step, draw a card. When this creature dies, if it didn't enter this turn, you lose 2 life.

card.name: Iron Empire Elite
card.text: This creature has haste and lifelink as long as you control another Rat. Remove two Moonstone counters from yourself: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Eater of the Forgotten
Withering Grief
card.text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. If you sacrificed a creature this turn, all creatures your opponents control get -2/-2 instead.

card.name: Necromancer's Whim
card.text: Kicker {3}{B} Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. If this spell was kicked, return that creature card to the battlefield tapped instead.

card.name: Alleyway Ambush
card.text: Exile target tapped creature. If you don't control a creature with equal or greater power than it, you lose 2 life.

card.name: Commune with Shadows
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Look at the top four cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Priest of Primordial Fire
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability, it deals 1 damage to that spell or ability's controller. {T}: Add {R}. This mana can only be spent to cast red spells or activate abilities of red permanents.

card.name: Jack of All Spells
card.text: Flying When this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may discard a card. When you do, exile the top two cards of that player's library. Until end of turn, you may play cards exiled this way.

card.name: Navu, Eager Pyromancer
card.text: Menace {R}, {T}, Exile two cards from your graveyard: This creature deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Dashing Vigilante
card.text: This creature has haste as long as you control another militant. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.) During your turn, this creature has first strike.

card.name: Flux Initiate
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Whenever this creature attacks, instant and/or sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast until end of turn.

card.name: Streetwise Adventurer
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {1}{G}. When you do, return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Dance of Fire
card.text: This spell deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Storm the Palace
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain menace and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Shattershot
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target nonbasic land. • Exile target artifact.

card.name: Psychic Enslavement
card.text: Untap target creature and gain control of it until end of turn. Until end of turn, it gains haste and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may pay {1} or discard a card. If you do, draw a card."

card.name: Phoenix Mantle
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has flying and "{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." {3}{B}{R}: If this card is in your graveyard, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, then return this Aura to the battlefield attached to that creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Summer Coast Druid
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Bellowdepths Channeler
card.text: Remove a Moonstone counter from yourself or exile two cards from your graveyard: This creature gains hexproof until end of turn. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to an opponent, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Matriarch of Ancient Ways
card.text: The first time each turn an opponent casts a noncreature spell with a single target, you draw a card. {1}{G}, {T}: Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Lafahd Sandsprinter
card.text: This creature enters with a scout counter on it. As long as it has a scout counter on it, it can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach. {3}{R}{G}, Remove a scout counter from this creature: Choose one. X is the number of lands you control. — • Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature. • This creature deals X damage to target permanent.

card.name: Grand Council of the Iron Empire
card.text: This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature dies, you may exile it. When you do, search your library for a black, green, white, Rat or Mouse card with mana value equal to this creature's power, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Escaped Anuroid
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove a Moonstone counter from yourself or sacrifice a land. Reach, trample, vigilance, ward {1}

card.name: Solidarity
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. This triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Building the Frontier
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, you gain 1 life. If this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. If that creature is militant, put two +1/+1 counters on it instead. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.)

card.name: Visions of Other Worlds
card.text: Mill five cards, then you may return a card milled this way to your hand.

card.name: Jade Ritual
card.text: Create a 2/2 green Rhino Druid creature token with vigilance. Choose one — • You get a Moonstone counter, then put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control. • Add two mana of any one color.

card.name: Under the Iron Capitol
card.text: Kicker—{B} Create a 1/1 black Rat Rogue creature token with menace and a 1/1 white Rat Citizen creature token. Then if this spell was kicked, you lose 2 life and put a +1/+1 counter on each Rat you control.

card.name: Pauri Esken, Mounted Justice
card.text: Flash Lifelink

card.name: Rouser Elder
card.text: Militant creatures you control get +1/+0. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.) Whenever this creature attacks, up to two target Rats become a Hero in addition to their other creature types. (This effect lasts indefinitely.) At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 white Rat Citizen creature token.

card.name: Circumzenith Commander
card.text: Flying Whenever you gain life, put that many +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: General of the Guards
card.text: Protection from non-militant creatures (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, or dealt damage by creatures that aren't Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers or Warriors.) Double strike Opponents can't cast spells or activate abilities during your turn.

card.name: Iron Empire Brigade
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another nontoken Rat you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/1 white, black, and green Rat Soldier creature token.

card.name: Vow of Justice
card.text: This spell can't be countered as long as you control two or more Birds. Creatures you control with flying get +1/+1 and gain first strike and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Rest in Peace
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile all graveyards. If a card or token would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, exile it instead.

card.name: Cunning Trader
card.text: {1}, {T}: Target opponent gains control of target permanent you control. You get Moonstone counters equal to that permanent's mana value. {U}{U}, {T}, Remove X Moonstone counters from yourself: Gain control of target nonland permanent with mana value X.

card.name: Supercell Channeler
card.text: Flash, kicker {2} Flying When this creature enters the battlefield, if it was kicked, copy target instant, sorcery, or ability. Whenever you copy a spell for the first time each turn, draw a card.

card.name: Mistress of Misplacement
card.text: Hexproof This creature can't be blocked. If this creature would deal more than 1 damage to an opponent, you may have it instead deal 1 damage to that opponent and you draw a card.

card.name: Titanic Rudan
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Moonstone counter you have and each Bird you control. Flying, trample This creature gets +1/+0 for each militant creature your opponents control. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.)

card.name: Twilight Pickpocketing
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if two or more unblocked creatures you controlled dealt combat damage to an opponent this turn. Search target opponent's library for a nonland card with mana value 7 or less and exile it. Until end of turn, you may cast that card from exile without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Pass Down Secrets
card.text: Choose one — • Return up to two target instant, sorcery or artifact cards from your graveyard to your hand. • Mill five cards, then return any number of cards with Wisdom from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Pass Down Secrets.

card.name: Dance of the New Cycle
card.text: Wisdom 5 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile five cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. You may then tap that token. If you do, you mill cards equal to its power, then draw two cards.

card.name: Speaker of Ancient Gods
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, draw a card, then if you don't control another Rat, you lose 2 life.

card.name: Honortail Paragon
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, Rats you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Neshezoi, Mad Harbinger
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life Flying Whenever a player discards one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever Neshezoi attacks, if any player has no cards in hand, you may put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield.

card.name: Memorivore Witch
card.text: Flying As long as a creature died this turn, black spells you cast have Wisdom X, where X is their mana value. (As an additional cost to cast a black spell, you may exile X cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy that spell, and you may choose new targets for the copy.)

card.name: Brawl at the Docks
card.text: This spell can't be countered as long as you control two or more Rats. Create three 1/1 black Rat Rogue creature tokens with Menace, then target opponent loses X life, where X is the number of Rats you control.

card.name: Power from Pain
card.text: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a battle, opponent or planeswalker, you may lose 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: Return to Instinct
card.text: If a player discarding a card causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Longsight Siege Brother
card.text: Haste, trample When this creature enters, for each player, destroy target nonbasic land that player controls. Whenever you pay a Wisdom cost, you may exile this creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Icespine Range Magstier
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature attacks, discard a card. If the discarded card is an instant or sorcery, draw a card. If it isn't, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Visionary Metalsmith
card.text: Remove a Moonstone counter from yourself: Add two mana of any one color. Use this mana only to cast artifact spells or activate artifact abilities. Activate only once each turn. Artifact creatures and equipped creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Carnivorous Blossom
card.text: This spell can't be countered as long as a land entered under your control this turn. Haste, reach, trample This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.

card.name: Boltwhirl
card.text: Choose target creature. Until end of turn, if that creature would be dealt excess damage by sources you control, that damage is dealt to each opponent instead. This spell deals 4 damage to each battle, creature and planeswalker.

card.name: Blazing Technique
card.text: Wisdom 2 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile two cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature gets +2/+1 and has haste, first strike, and menace.

card.name: In the Presence of Greatness
card.text: As long as you control a legendary creature or a creature with power 5 or greater, this enchantment has ward—pay 3 life. Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0 and have menace. Your opponents can't gain life.

card.name: Gruszalb, Chief Mountain
card.text: This spell can't be countered as long as you've attacked with two or more creatures this turn. Trample Whenever Gruszalb deals excess combat damage to an opponent, you gain that many Moonstone counters. Whenever you scry, each other creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Exiled Worldspeaker
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, mill two cards, then return a land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target nonartifact permanent you control.

card.name: Yewdodelg, Ancient and Wise
card.text: {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Yewdodelg: If you have more than double your starting life total, you win the game. Activate only as a sorcery. {3}, {T}: You gain 1 life for each creature you control

card.name: Seeker of Strength
card.text: Trample Whenever you get one or more Moonstone counters, or remove one or more Moonstone counters from yourself, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Dedicated Mining Crew
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever this creature enters or attacks, choose one — • Create a tapped Treasure token. • You get a Moonstone counter. • Create a 1/1 white Rat Citizen creature token.

card.name: Debate the Fauna
card.text: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is twice the number of creatures you control. Reveal two of those cards. An opponent chooses one of them. Put it into your hand. Then put any number of the other cards you looked at into your graveyard and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Summoning Ancestors
card.text: Whenever one or more land cards leave your graveyard or are put into your graveyard from anywhere, put a charge counter on this enchantment. Sacrifice this enchantment: Create a 3/1 green Dog Spirit creature token with vigilance for every charge counter on this enchantment.

card.name: Mouratl, the Eternal
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Mouratl enters, if you have five or more Moonstone counters, double your life total. When you don't, you gain 4 life and get three Moonstone counters.

card.name: Feast with the King
card.text: Create a Food token. Until end of turn, whenever you gain life, creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the life gained this way.

card.name: Cosmic Secrets
card.text: Draw two cards. If you have four or more Moonstone counters, instead scry 2, then draw 3 cards.

card.name: Y'ssna, Cephaloid Oracle
Raios, the Founder
card.text: Lifelink, ward—Pay 3 life When Raios enters, you may pay X life. When you do, you get X Moonstone counters. Pay X life or remove X Moonstone counters from yourself: Return target Rat card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Honoring Their Sacrifice
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a creature, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. Sacrifice a creature: Gain 2 life, then scry 1. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery. At the beginning of your end step, if no creatures died this turn, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Tawikyan, Avaricious Queen
card.text: Flying, haste When Tawikyan enters, if you have eight or more Moonstone counters, she deals ten damage to each opponent. Otherwise, she deals 3 damage to each opponent and you get two Moonstone counters.

card.name: M'gruk, Interplanar Plunderer
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever M'gruk deals combat damage to an opponent, create a Treasure token. Tap an untapped artifact you control: M'gruk gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Boc, Emerald Hart
card.text: Reach, vigilance When Boc enters, if you have eight or more Moonstone counters, search your library for up to ten land cards and put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Otherwise, you get three Moonstone counters and put up to two land cards from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Klawia's Ascent
card.text: Kicker {W} and/or {R} Search your library for a land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If this spell was kicked with its {W} kicker, you gain 4 life. If this spell was kicked with its {R} kicker, it deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Steadfast Retriever
card.text: Haste, reach, vigilance At the beginning of your end step, you may return a creature you control to its owner's hand. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Queen Scoraya of Hagzaga
card.text: Flying, hexproof Permanent spells you cast with flying cost {1} less to cast. At the beginning of your end step, scry 1.

card.name: Urvinn, Count of Wastehold
card.text: Flying, deathtouch, ward {1} Whenever Urvinn deals combat damage to an opponent or planeswalker, you draw a card and that player or that planeswalker's controller discards a card.

card.name: Jetrax, Dark Archon
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Jetrax deals combat damage to an opponent, return all cards in your graveyard that you discarded this turn to your hand. {B}{R}, Discard a card: Jetrax deals 1 damage to any target. Activate only once each turn, and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Crystal Flameblossom
card.text: If a land you control would enter tapped, you may have it deal 1 damage to you. When you do, it enters untapped instead. At the beginning of your end step, if two or more land cards entered and/or left your graveyard this turn, this enchantment deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: The Flower Picker Inn
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a Food token. At the beginning of your end step, you may put a creature or planeswalker card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield, where X is the life you've gained this turn.

card.name: Liau, Primordial Mother
card.text: Liau enters with four +1/+1 counters on her. At the beginning of your end step, create a token that's a copy of target creature token you control. If Liau would be dealt damage, instead prevent that damage, remove a counter from Liau, and create a 1/1 black and white Cat Elemental creature token.

card.name: Klawia's Disguise
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control becomes a copy of another creature, gains haste, and can't be blocked by creatures with the same name.

card.name: Iron Empire Monolith
card.text: Rats you control get +1/+1. Mice you control get +1/+0. At the beginning of each end step, if a Rat you controlled died this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Hired Carriage
card.text: When this artifact enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it and put it into your hand, then shuffle. Crew 2

card.name: Moonlaced Potion
card.text: When this artifact enters, you gain a Moonstone counter. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card, then add one mana of any color.

card.name: Masterpiece Shield
card.text: Equipped creature gets +0/+3 and has vigilance. Equip {1}

card.name: Necklace of Fangs
Honeywine Elixir
card.text: {T}: You gain 1 life. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. Target creature gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Farsight Blade
Deciphered Relic
card.text: Wisdom 4 (As an additional cost to cast this, you may exile four cards from your graveyard. If you do, copy it, and you may choose new targets for the copy.) This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add two mana of any one color among cards put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn.

card.name: Summer Throne
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 1/1 colorless Bird Noble creature token with flying. At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 2. Birds you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Tezakayt Fortress
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters or dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Voidmind Axe
A Path Between
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. When this land becomes untapped, sacrifice it, then search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Verdant Gorge Falls
card.text: As this enters, you may sacrifice a land or discard a land card from your hand. If you don't, this enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}, {R}, or {G}.

card.name: Abandoned Prison
card.text: As this enters, you may sacrifice a land or discard a land card from your hand. If you don't, this enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {R}.

card.name: Garrisoned Homeland
card.text: As this enters, you may sacrifice a land or discard a land card from your hand. If you don't, this enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {G}.

card.name: Seaweed Nations
card.text: As this enters, you may sacrifice a land or discard a land card from your hand. If you don't, this enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}, {B}, or {G}.

card.name: Blue Sky Cities
card.text: As this enters, you may sacrifice a land or discard a land card from your hand. If you don't, this enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {R}.

card.name: The Life of an Epicure
card.text: Enchant creature you control When this Aura enters, you gain 2 life. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample. The first time you gain life each turn, enchanted creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Defend the Temple
card.text: This spell can't be countered. This spell deals 3 damage to any target. If you control a militant, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. (Armies, Heroes, Knights, Soldiers and Warriors are militants.)

card.name: Cultist of Dus Acasui
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, choose one — • Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn. • Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Oracle's Encouragement
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 white Bird Citizen creature token with flying. Creature tokens you control have vigilance. Whenever you attack with four or more creatures, scry 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Watchpost Village
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to or dealt by target creature this turn.

card.name: Wrathful Lerna
card.text: This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each mana spent to cast it. Trample Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may remove a counter from yourself or a permanent you control. If you do, draw a card, gain 1 life, and each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Revered Moonstaff
card.text: Equipped creature gets +X/+X and has ward {X}, where X is the number of Moonstone counters you have. Equip {2} or remove a Moonstone counter from yourself

card.name: Repulsive Soulblade
Starshine Charms
card.text: Choose one. If you've gained life this turn, choose any number instead — • Exile target artifact or enchantment. • You may play an additional land this turn. Draw a card. • Put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Moonrise Bravado
card.text: Creatures you control have haste and attack each combat if able.

card.name: Nourishing Misery
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice, discards a card, mills two cards, and loses 2 life. Then if any opponent didn't sacrifice a creature or discard a card this way, you draw a card.

card.name: Icespark
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 2, then if you have more life than each opponent, draw a card. Sacrifice this enchantment: Tap target creature and put six stun counters on it.

card.name: Eela, Tropical Windspeaker
card.text: Flying Whenever Eela deals combat damage to an opponent, you may pay {X}{UR}. When you do, exile target instant or sorcery card from a graveyard. At the beginning of your upkeep, choose a card exiled with Eela. You may cast that card this turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Impatient Dragonling
card.text: Haste, ward—pay 2 life This creature gets +3/+3 and has flying as long as it's a token. Encore {3}{WB}{R} ({3}{WB}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: The Jamakhora
card.text: Haste, flying, deathtouch The Jamakhora has indestructible as long as a creature an opponent controlled died this turn. Whenever The Jamakhora attacks, you may have it fight target creature you don't control.

card.name: Esurvite Holy Book
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. At the beginning of your upkeep, mill ten cards. At the beginning of your end step, if there are one or more cards in your graveyard, shuffle them into your library.

card.name: Jury of the Midnight Court
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • You get three Moonstone counters. • Return a card from your graveyard to your hand. {X}{B}{G}{U}, {T}: Return target permanent card with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield. This costs {1} less to activate for each Moonstone counter you have.

card.name: Stunning Theft
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard up to two cards. Gain control of target spell with mana value less than or equal to the total mana value of the discarded cards. You may choose new targets for it. (If that spell becomes a permanent, it enters under your control.)

card.name: Rat Rogue MST
card.text: Menace

card.name: Jeddina, Digital Huntress
card.text: Haste, reach, vigilance At the beginning of each combat, if an opponent controls a legendary creature, Jeddina gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Drake Elemental MST
card.text: Flying

card.name: Dragon MST
card.text: Flying

card.name: Bird Noble MST
card.text: Flying

card.name: Food MST
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Gain 3 life.

card.name: Bird Citizen MST
card.text: Flying

card.name: Bird Spirit MST
card.text: Flying

card.name: Treasure MST
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Dog Spirit MST
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Rhino Druid MST
card.text: Vigilance
